adopted_doctrine: Canonicalization creates stable identity, not certainty.
Audits evaluate but do not own or rewrite their subjects.
Human decisions authorize bounded consequences, not universal truth.
Retention is consent-bounded inspectability, not canon.
Provenance must remain useful and proportionate.

refinements.rule: Infer accepted outcome, rationale, boundaries, and predecessor state before asking the human to repeat them.
refinements.title: Mission inference from provenance

refinements.rule: Keep integrity, lineage, independence, support, authority, privacy, and usefulness separate.
refinements.title: Evidence vector

refinements.rule: A hold requires observed failure, affected invariant/boundary, plausible consequence, owner, exit test, and retirement condition.
refinements.title: Consequence-based hold admission

refinements.rule: Freeze acceptance before implementation and inherit accepted evidence until a changed surface plausibly affects it.
refinements.title: Gate freeze and evidence inheritance

refinements.rule: A test supporting a production claim must fail when that production path is disabled.
refinements.title: Production-path sensitivity

refinements.rule: Challenge false premises and brittle validators while preserving the authorized outcome.
refinements.title: Dissent and method freedom

refinements.rule: Connected runtime, schema, verifier, CLI, and test failures close on one branch.
refinements.title: Work-unit closure

refinements.rule: A driver defect invalidates evidence, not the product.
refinements.title: Driver/product separation

refinements.rule: Apprentices demonstrate competence on real merge, package, validator, and revocation artifacts.
refinements.title: Product-real practicum

refinements.rule: Simplify controls after repeated non-detection unless they guard sensitive or irreversible consequences.
refinements.title: Control retirement

repository_adoption.atlas: repo-local posture/decision profile; fold into next relevant presentation/publication tranche
repository_adoption.civicproof: use real package artifacts as practicum; do not copy the triadic curriculum
repository_adoption.coherencelattice: canonical package; fold into next substantive provenance-related tranche
repository_adoption.sophia: repo-local audit profile; fold into next relevant audit/apprentice tranche
